name: io.github.ejentum/ejentum-mcp
description: Ejentum MCP server. Eight tools (four dynamic: reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory; four adaptive: adaptive-reasoning, adaptive-code, adaptive-anti-deception, adaptive-memory) that retrieve task-matched cognitive operations the agent reads before generating. Adaptive tools require the Go or Super tier.

environmentVariables.name: EJENTUM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Ejentum API key. Get one at https://ejentum.com/pricing (30-day free trial; Go or Super tier required for adaptive tools).

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token with EJENTUM_API_KEY. Get one at https://ejentum.com/pricing (30-day free trial; Go or Super tier required for adaptive tools).
